steps.t: Mithenn inside Caras Galadhon wishes you to carry supplies he left outside the gates of that city to the base of Talan Fanuidhol. Mithenn wants to ens…
Faelleron is at the base of Talan Fanuidhol. You have delivered a crate of supplies to Talan Fanuidhol and should now speak with Faelleron.
